boxes.text: Algorithm 1 Implicit Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (iMAML) 1: Require: Distribution over tasks P(T), outer step size n, regularization strength X, 2: while not converged do 3: Sample mini-batch of tasks {Ti}-1 ~ P(T) 4: for Each task T, do. 5: Compute task meta-gradient gi = Implicit-Meta-Gradient(Ti, 0, ) 6: end for 7: 8: Update meta-parameters with gradient descent: 0  0 - n F()II (or Adam) 9: end while. Algorithm 2 Implicit Meta-Gradient Computation 1: Input: Task T, meta-parameters 0, regularization strength X 2: Hyperparameters: Optimization accuracy thresholds  and 8' 3: Obtain task parameters ; using iterative optimization solver such that: i  Alg*(0)   4: Compute partial outer-level gradient v; = VoL(i) 5: Use an iterative solver (e.g. CG) along with reverse mode differentiation (to compute Hessian vector products) to compute gi such that: ||gi - (I + V2L($i))-'vi|l  8' 6: Return: gi
